_comment: - dep-cruise sees orphans (files imported by nothing).
- knip also sees unused exports (functions/consts no one calls),
unused devDeps, and unused npm scripts.
Entries are LOADED, not imported — Knip treats them as the start
of the reachable graph. Anything not transitively reachable from
We intentionally do NOT list lib/*.sys.mjs as entries. Those land
in PR #2 (refactor/api-modular-split). When that PR lands, the
entries list grows to include them.
